det_check_template:
proof fn det_align_up(x: usize, y: usize, r1: usize, r2: usize)
    requires (y != 0), (x + y - 1 <= usize::MAX),
    ensures
        ({
            &&& (r1 == ((x + y - 1) / y as int) * y)
            &&& (x <= r1 <= x + y - 1)
            &&& (r1 % y == 0)
            &&& ((r1 / y * y) == r1)
            &&& (r2 == ((x + y - 1) / y as int) * y)
            &&& (x <= r2 <= x + y - 1)
            &&& (r2 % y == 0)
            &&& ((r2 / y * y) == r2)
        }) ==> det_align_up_equal(r1, r2),
{
{ASSUMES}}
